title: Slow Baby Zombie
description: Slows down baby zombies, instead of outright removing them
body:
Have you ever fought zombies? Of course you have! But have you fought the terror that is a baby zombie? Well with this mod you don't have to worry about them! Sure they're still small and they're still gonna say mean things about your house, but at least they're not as fast anymore.

This mod makes baby zombies walk at the same speed as regular zombies, to give players a better chance of surviving those Flash-wannabes. The changes in this mod aren't exclusive to baby zombies, but also includes husks, zombie villagers, zombified piglins and drowneds.
